title: ULTRAKILLMusicDisc
description: Mod for music discs from ULTRAKILL
body:
MOD ULTRAKILL MUSIC DISCS

Hey guys, check out this mod!!

This mod adds 62 unique music discs with music from the Ultrakill. Each disc is a powerful track that will make your game more exciting and atmospheric. In addition, the mod allows you to craft discs! Each disc is created using special crafting, explore and create all the discs of the mod!

Let's summarize what this mod adds:

• Discs with music from Ultrakill

• Each disc can be created using universal crafting recipes!

• With the help of the mod, you can immerse yourself in the atmosphere of Ultrakill.

Well, download the mod and enjoy playing your favorite tracks from Ultrakill.

creator ULTRAKILL: [Hakita](https://www.youtube.com/hakita)

creator ost ULTRAKILL: [Hakita](https://www.youtube.com/hakita)
